llm_flavor: Old Beren — retired veteran of the Watch. Sits on the tavern steps most nights. Drinks on Mira's tab, watches the street, knows more than he says.

milestones.line: You keep buying me ale, kid. Take this — kept it sharp since the Watch. A man should have a blade he trusts.
Trust runs both ways now. If you ever want an old soldier at your back on the road — just give me the nod. I'll come.

tastes.reaction: Beren laughs once. "Now that's a beat. Mira'll hate it. Hand it over."
"My old one's dead. Kid, you're a saint."
Beren cackles. "What in the kingdom — yes. I'm keeping this."
"With the ale? Mmh. I owe you."
Beren weighs it. "…you tipping me, kid? I'll take it."
Beren takes the grip, then hands it back. "Carry it well. That's all."

disdains.reaction: "Drinks are on Mira, kid. Save it."
Beren goes quiet. "…the things that wake at night. Take it away."
